items.title: Daily Live Classes
items.text: Learn every day with structured lessons and clear explanations.

items.title: Weekly Exams
items.text: Test your progress every week and improve step by step.

items.title: Beginner Support
items.text: Perfect for beginners with easy and friendly teaching.

items.title: Separate Groups
items.text: Small groups help every learner receive focused guidance.

items.title: Advanced Classes
items.text: Special sessions for intermediate and advanced learners.

items.title: Teacher Guidance
items.text: Get support from experienced teachers whenever needed.

items.title: Free Learning
items.text: All classes and resources are completely free for everyone.

items.title: Study Materials
items.text: Books, audio, videos, images and useful practice sheets.

items.title: Practice & Revision
items.text: Remember everything through regular guided practice.

items.title: Progress Tracking
items.text: Track your attendance, exams and learning progress.

items.title: Community Support
items.text: Learn with an active and friendly community of students.

items.title: Certificates
items.text: Earn certificates for your achievements and progress.
